/**
 * Translate a UI key to the target language.
 * For languages with full tables (en, he): uses static table.
 * For all other languages: checks auto-translate cache, returns English fallback while async translation runs.
 */
export function translate(language, key, fallback) {
  // Try language-specific table first
  const langTable = TRANSLATIONS[language];
  if (langTable) {
    const translation = langTable[key];
    if (translation) return translation;
    // Key missing in this language's table → fall through to English
  }

  // For non-English/non-Hebrew languages, try auto-translate cache (synchronous read)
  if (language && language !== 'en') {
    try {
      // Dynamic import of auto-translate is async, so we do a direct localStorage read here
      const cacheRaw = localStorage.getItem(`ui_trans_${language}`);
      if (cacheRaw) {
        const cache = JSON.parse(cacheRaw);
        if (cache[key]) return cache[key];
      }
    } catch {}
  }

  // Fallback to English
  const enTranslation = TRANSLATIONS.en[key];
  return enTranslation || fallback || key;
}

/**
 * Format a translation string with variables
 * Example: formatTranslation(t('notification.liked'), { user: 'John' })
 */
export function formatTranslation(template, variables = {}) {
  return Object.entries(variables).reduce((str, [key, value]) => {
    return str.replace(new RegExp(`{${key}}`, 'g'), value);
  }, template);
}

// Merge quota/reset i18n for all 18 languages
import QUOTA_TRANSLATIONS from './translations-quota.js';
for (const [lang, keys] of Object.entries(QUOTA_TRANSLATIONS)) {
  if (TRANSLATIONS[lang]) Object.assign(TRANSLATIONS[lang], keys);
}

// Merge time chip + shop label translations for all 18 languages
import TIME_SHOP_TRANSLATIONS from './translations-time-shop.js';
for (const [lang, keys] of Object.entries(TIME_SHOP_TRANSLATIONS)) {
  if (!TRANSLATIONS[lang]) TRANSLATIONS[lang] = {};
  Object.assign(TRANSLATIONS[lang], keys);
}

// Merge error translations for all 18 languages
import ERROR_TRANSLATIONS from './translations-errors.js';
for (const [lang, keys] of Object.entries(ERROR_TRANSLATIONS)) {
  if (!TRANSLATIONS[lang]) TRANSLATIONS[lang] = {};
  Object.assign(TRANSLATIONS[lang], keys);
}

// Merge generate/recipe UI translations for all 18 languages
import GENERATE_UI_TRANSLATIONS from './translations-generate-ui.js';
for (const [lang, keys] of Object.entries(GENERATE_UI_TRANSLATIONS)) {
  if (!TRANSLATIONS[lang]) TRANSLATIONS[lang] = {};
  Object.assign(TRANSLATIONS[lang], keys);
}

import DIFFICULTY_TRANSLATIONS from './translations-difficulty.js';
import MEAL_HISTORY_TRANSLATIONS from './translations-meal-history.js';
for (const SRC of [DIFFICULTY_TRANSLATIONS, MEAL_HISTORY_TRANSLATIONS]) {
  for (const [lang, keys] of Object.entries(SRC)) {
    if (!TRANSLATIONS[lang]) TRANSLATIONS[lang] = {};
    Object.assign(TRANSLATIONS[lang], keys);
  }
}

/**
 * CanonicalIngredientDatabase — Production-Grade Ingredient Pricing Catalog
 *
 * 650+ canonical ingredients covering all major food categories.
 * Prices are USD per 100g (or 100ml for liquids), based on US average retail.
 *
 * Architecture:
 *   - CANONICAL_INGREDIENTS: array ordered most-specific → least-specific
 *   - lookupCanonical(name): fast regex + alias lookup
 *   - COUNTRY_MULTIPLIERS: per-country price adjustment (US = 1.00 baseline)
 *   - CATEGORY_FLOORS: minimum realistic price per 100g to prevent absurd values
 *   - PIECE_WEIGHTS: gram equivalents for discrete units
 *
 * Pricing sources:
 *   - USDA food databases + BLS CPI food data (US baselines)
 *   - FAO GIEWS food price monitoring (international)
 *   - Internal curation for accuracy + sanity
 *
 * Updated: 2025-Q1
 */

// ── CATEGORY PRICE FLOORS (minimum USD per 100g/100ml) ───────────────────────
export const CATEGORY_FLOORS = {
  poultry:        1.20,  // $12/kg minimum
  meat:           1.20,  // $12/kg minimum
  seafood:        1.80,  // $18/kg minimum
  eggs:           1.10,
  cheese:         1.80,
  dairy:          0.35,
  vegetable:      0.12,
  fruit:          0.15,
  grain:          0.08,
  spice:          0.40,
  oil:            0.18,
  condiment:      0.12,
  pantry:         0.08,
  legume:         0.22,  // realistic floor for cooked/canned legumes; dry lentils use price_per_100g directly
  nut:            0.80,
  seed:           0.50,
  herb:           0.50,
  default:        0.20,
};

// ── ALIAS MAP (flat map for O(1) alias lookup) ────────────────────────────────
const ALIAS_MAP = (() => {
  const map = new Map();
  for (const entry of CANONICAL_INGREDIENTS) {
    if (entry.aliases) {
      for (const alias of entry.aliases) {
        map.set(alias.toLowerCase().trim(), entry);
      }
    }
  }
  return map;
})();

/**
 * lookupCanonical — Look up an ingredient against the canonical database.
 *
 * Priority order:
 *   1. Direct alias map (O(1), exact match)
 *   2. Regex pattern match (ordered most-specific first)
 *
 * @param {string} ingredientName
 * @returns {object|null} canonical entry with confidence score
 */
export function lookupCanonical(ingredientName) {
  if (!ingredientName) return null;
  const lower = ingredientName.toLowerCase().trim();

  // Strip common adjectives that shouldn't change the ingredient
  const descriptorStripped = lower
    .replace(/\b(fresh|dried|frozen|canned|tinned|organic|raw|whole|chopped|diced|sliced|minced|grated|shredded|blanched|roasted|grilled|cooked|large|medium|small|ripe|unripe|baby|young|aged)\s+/gi, '')
    .trim();

  // Priority 1: Exact alias match
  if (ALIAS_MAP.has(lower)) return { ...ALIAS_MAP.get(lower), match_method: 'alias', match_confidence: 0.95 };
  if (descriptorStripped && ALIAS_MAP.has(descriptorStripped)) {
    return { ...ALIAS_MAP.get(descriptorStripped), match_method: 'alias_stripped', match_confidence: 0.90 };
  }

  // Priority 2: Regex pattern match
  for (const entry of CANONICAL_INGREDIENTS) {
    if (entry.pattern.test(lower)) return { ...entry, match_method: 'pattern', match_confidence: 0.85 };
  }

  // Priority 3: Stripped descriptor pattern match
  if (descriptorStripped && descriptorStripped !== lower) {
    for (const entry of CANONICAL_INGREDIENTS) {
      if (entry.pattern.test(descriptorStripped)) return { ...entry, match_method: 'pattern_stripped', match_confidence: 0.75 };
    }
  }

  return null;
}

/**
 * getCountryMultiplier — Get price multiplier for a given country code.
 *
 * @param {string} countryCode - ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code (e.g. 'US', 'DE', 'JP')
 * @returns {number} multiplier (US = 1.00)
 */
export function getCountryMultiplier(countryCode = 'US') {
  if (!countryCode) return COUNTRY_MULTIPLIERS.DEFAULT;
  const code = countryCode.toUpperCase().trim();
  return COUNTRY_MULTIPLIERS[code] ?? COUNTRY_MULTIPLIERS.DEFAULT;
}

// Legacy alias for backwards compatibility
export const REGION_MULTIPLIERS = COUNTRY_MULTIPLIERS;

// ── PROTEIN MINIMUM PRICE VALIDATION ──────────────────────────────────────────
// HARD RULE: Any protein-based ingredient priced below 0.5 USD/100g is INVALID.
// This catches fallback/generic pricing that undershoots real-world protein costs.
const PROTEIN_CATEGORIES = new Set(['poultry', 'meat', 'seafood', 'eggs']);
const PROTEIN_MINIMUM_PER_100G = 0.50; // $0.50 USD/100g minimum for any protein

/**
 * validateProteinPricing — returns true if the price is valid for this ingredient.
 * Returns false if it's a protein-based ingredient priced below the hard minimum.
 */
export function validateProteinPricing(canonicalEntry, pricePerGram) {
  if (!canonicalEntry || pricePerGram == null) return true; // can't validate, pass through
  if (!PROTEIN_CATEGORIES.has(canonicalEntry.category)) return true; // not a protein
  const pricePer100g = pricePerGram * 100;
  return pricePer100g >= PROTEIN_MINIMUM_PER_100G;
}

{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "baseUrl": ".",
    "paths": {
      "@/*": ["./src/*"]
    },
    "jsx": "react-jsx",
    "module": "esnext",
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "lib": ["esnext", "dom"],
    "target": "esnext",
    "checkJs": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "allowSyntheticDefaultImports": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "types": []
  },
  "include": ["src/components/**/*.js", "src/pages/**/*.jsx", "src/Layout.jsx"],
  "exclude": ["node_modules", "dist", "src/vite-plugins", "src/components/ui", "src/api", "src/lib"]
}

{
  "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema.json",
  "style": "new-york",
  "rsc": false,
  "tsx": false,
  "tailwind": {
    "config": "tailwind.config.js",
    "css": "src/index.css",
    "baseColor": "neutral",
    "cssVariables": true,
    "prefix": ""
  },
  "aliases": {
    "components": "@/components",
    "utils": "@/lib/utils",
    "ui": "@/components/ui",
    "lib": "@/lib",
    "hooks": "@/hooks"
  },
  "iconLibrary": "lucide"
}

/** * reportEmailTemplate.js — Report email HTML/text renderer reference * * NOTE: This file documents the canonical template structure for Reciply report emails. * Deno backend functions (functions/) cannot import this file directly due to * Base44 platform constraints (no local imports between deployed functions). * * The live template is inlined in functions/sendReportEmail.js. * This file exists as the authoritative reference and for any future * frontend email preview tooling. * * Provider: Resend (no Base44 credits consumed) * From: Reciply */ import { buildReportAdminUrls } from './reportAdminLinks.js'; /** * Build the premium Gmail-safe HTML for a moderation report email. * Key Gmail-safety rules: * - bgcolor="" attribute on every with a background (Gmail strips CSS gradients from td) * - Solid background-color values only on structural elements (no gradients) * - All styles inline — no class="" attributes * - Table-based layout for the card container * - Buttons as tags with inline padding and solid background-color */ export function buildReportEmailHTML({ reportId, targetType, targetId, reporterEmail, reporterId, reason, details, createdAt, urls, env }) { const targetLabel = targetType ? targetType.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + targetType.slice(1) : 'Unknown'; const envBanner = (env && env !== 'production') ? `
⚠  ${env.toUpperCase()} ENVIRONMENT — NOT PRODUCTION
` : ''; const sectionTitle = (text) => `${text}`; const dataRow = (label, value, mono = false) => ` ${label} ${value} `; const btn = (emoji, label, url, bgColor) => `${emoji}  ${label}`; return ` Reciply Moderation Report
🍳
Reciply
🚨  New Report Submitted
${envBanner} ${sectionTitle('Report Details')} ${sectionTitle('Reporter')} ${sectionTitle('Reason')} ${sectionTitle('Additional Details')} ${sectionTitle('Quick Actions')}
${dataRow('Target ID', targetId, true)} ${dataRow('Submitted', createdAt)}
Report ID ${reportId}
Target Type ${targetLabel}
${dataRow('Email', reporterEmail || 'Not provided')} ${dataRow('User ID', reporterId || 'Not provided', true)}
${reason || 'No reason provided'}
${details || 'No additional details provided.'}
 
${btn('📋', 'Open Report', urls.openReport, '#4f46e5')} ${btn('🎯', 'Open Target', urls.openTarget, '#0891b2')} ${btn('👤', 'Open Reporter', urls.openReporter, '#059669')} ${btn('🛡️', 'Admin Panel', urls.adminPanel, '#374151')}
Open Report · Open Target · Open Reporter · Admin Panel
Sent from the Reciply moderation system. Do not reply to this email.
© 2026 Reciply · All rights reserved
`; } /** * Build clean plain-text fallback for the moderation report email. */ export function buildReportEmailText({ reportId, targetType, targetId, reporterEmail, reporterId, reason, details, createdAt, urls }) { return `RECIPLY MODERATION ALERT ======================== New Report Submitted REPORT DETAILS -------------- Report ID: ${reportId} Target Type: ${targetType} Target ID: ${targetId} Submitted: ${createdAt} REPORTER -------- Email: ${reporterEmail || 'Not provided'} User ID: ${reporterId || 'Not provided'} REASON ------ ${reason} ADDITIONAL DETAILS ------------------ ${details || 'No additional details provided.'} QUICK ACTIONS ------------- Open Report: ${urls.openReport} Open Target: ${urls.openTarget} Open Reporter: ${urls.openReporter} Admin Panel: ${urls.adminPanel} --- Sent from Reciply moderation system. Do not reply.`.trim(); } /** * Build subject line for the moderation report email. */ export function buildReportEmailSubject(targetType, reason) { const cap = targetType ? targetType.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + targetType.slice(1) : 'Content'; return `🚨 Reciply Report — ${cap} — ${reason || 'No reason provided'}`; }

It expires in ${expiresIn}. If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore it. © 2026 Reciply `, }, delete_account: { subject: 'Confirm account deletion - Reciply', getHTML: (code, expiresIn = '10 minutes') => `
